Travel Insurance Policy Summary: Policy Number TRV-2024-88432 provides trip cancellation and interruption coverage up to $10,000 per person for non-refundable travel expenses. Emergency medical coverage of $250,000 per person is included, along with medical evacuation and repatriation coverage up to $1,000,000. The policy covers trip delays exceeding 6 hours (up to $200/day, 5-day maximum) and lost or delayed baggage ($500 per item limit, $2,500 total). Pre-existing conditions are covered if the policy was purchased within 14 days of the initial trip deposit and the insured was medically fit to travel at time of purchase.
